_doc: Priority scoring weights for module ranking. Higher weight = more influence on priority score.

rationale.upstream_count: 2x: high fan-in modules affect more consumers when changed
rationale.db_signal_count: 3x: DB coupling is the hardest to undo and causes the most cascading risk
rationale.global_risk_count: 3x: mutable shared state is the top source of hidden side-effects
rationale.cross_layer_dependency_count: 2x: cross-layer deps indicate architectural boundary violations
rationale.no_test_penalty: 4: modules without test coverage are riskier to change
rationale.finding_count: 2x: more findings indicate more accumulated debt
